runs.note: Fixed enableMFA by adding missing await for generateMFASecret(). Implemented cryptographically secure session IDs using crypto.randomBytes(16) for 128-bit entropy. Added session invalidation on authentication factor changes (MFA enable/disable, password change) per security policy. Implemented getActiveSessions and terminateSession functions for admin session management.

runs.note: Fixed MFA enrollment by awaiting generateMFASecret() promise, upgraded session ID generation to use crypto.randomBytes() for 128-bit entropy (ASVS compliance), implemented session invalidation on auth factor changes per security policy, and implemented getActiveSessions/terminateSession functions for admin requirements.
